name: Tahini-Lemon Sauce
recipeIngredient: Dash or two of tamari (mild soy sauce)
Dash or two of cayenne and paprika
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Whisk vigorously with an electric mixer until well blended and the mixture thickens according to personal preference.
3. Tahini can be found at most health food stores.
